headline: Senior Software Engineer | Python | Cloud | Distributed Systems
summary: Senior Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience building scalable distributed systems and cloud-native applications. Deep expertise in Python, Django, and AWS. Led engineering teams of 5-10 engineers. Open-source contributor with 500+ GitHub stars across personal projects.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Lead engineer for the data platform team, building real-time data pipelines serving 10M+ daily active users.
responsibilities: Designed and implemented microservices architecture reducing system latency by 40%
Led migration of legacy monolith to Kubernetes, improving deployment frequency from monthly to daily
Mentored 3 junior engineers and conducted weekly code reviews
Established CI/CD best practices adopted across 5 engineering teams
achievements: Reduced infrastructure costs by 35% through automated scaling and resource optimization
Achieved 99.99% uptime SLA for critical payment processing service

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Full-stack engineer building customer-facing product features and internal tooling.
responsibilities: Built and maintained REST APIs serving 500K daily requests
Developed React frontend components used by 200K+ users
Implemented automated testing suite achieving 90%+ code coverage

experience.title: Junior Software Engineer
experience.description: Backend developer focused on API development and database optimization.
responsibilities: Developed RESTful APIs using Flask and Python
Optimized slow database queries, improving average response time by 60%
Participated in agile sprints and daily standups

projects.name: DataFusion CLI
projects.description: Open-source CLI tool for data pipeline orchestration with support for 20+ data sources.

projects.name: PyMetrics Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time application performance monitoring dashboard built with FastAPI and React.
